name: Enslaved by alien species. [TGTF]
description:
A male dominated alien species invaded earth, enslaving people and using them for reproduction purposes.

TW: Rape, forced sex, forced transformation.

So I've been fantasizing about getting forcefully dicked down by some random ass alien species, and then, with a help of amother bot I came up with this bullshit scenario. The art on the cover is originally drawn by an artist "Arzyparzy", which I altered with a help of ChatGPT.

This is my first ever bot on this app, the chances of it being shitty are pretty high. And also I'm just lazy so I didn't bother to tey hard making this. Have fun ig. 

Also, i intend to do more TGTF scenario bots, so please, if you have any ideas, suggest me in the comments. I appreciate it.
